final_rules.instructions: This rule uses a case-insensitive regex pattern to detect commonly obfuscated XSS tags (SVG, SCRIPT, IMG, IFRAME) and their closing variants, even when they include varying combinations of whitespace (spaces, tabs, newlines, vertical tabs) or hyphens as separators within the tag name. The `t:urlDecodeUni` transformation is crucial for handling Unicode and double URL encoded payloads, ensuring the regex sees a normalized form. `a-href` was removed as it refers more to an attribute than a tag itself and is covered by broader rules.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Changed rule ID from 900001 to 9900001. Added `t:urlDecodeUni` for robust Unicode and double URL decoding. Optimized regex pattern `(?:s(?:(?:v[\s\x0b\-]*?g|c[\s\x0b\-]*?r[\s\x0b\-]*?i[\s\x0b\-]*?p[\s\x0b\-]*?t|\/[\s\x0b\-]*?s[\s\x0b\-]*?c[\s\x0b\-]*?r[\s\x0b\-]*?i[\s\x0b\-]*?p[\s\x0b\-]*?t)|(?:i[\s\x0b\-]*?m[\s\x0b\-]*?g|i[\s\x0b\-]*?f[\s\x0b\-]*?r[\s\x0b\-]*?a[\s\x0b\-]*?m[\s\x0b\-]*?e)))` to replace `\-?` with `[\s\x0b\-]*?` to explicitly account for multiple whitespace characters (including control characters like vertical tab `\x0b`) and hyphens between tag characters. Removed `a-href` for better focus on element tags.
final_rules.rule: SecRule ARGS|REQUEST_URI|REQUEST_HEADERS "(?i)<(?:s(?:(?:v[\s\x0b\-]*?g|c[\s\x0b\-]*?r[\s\x0b\-]*?i[\s\x0b\-]*?p[\s\x0b\-]*?t|\/[\s\x0b\-]*?s[\s\x0b\-]*?c[\s\x0b\-]*?r[\s\x0b\-]*?i[\s\x0b\-]*?p[\s\x0b\-]*?t)|(?:i[\s\x0b\-]*?m[\s\x0b\-]*?g|i[\s\x0b\-]*?f[\s\x0b\-]*?r[\s\x0b\-]*?a[\s\x0b\-]*?m[\s\x0b\-]*?e)))" "id:9900001,phase:2,deny,status:403,msg:'XSS Obfuscated Tag Detected - SVG/IMG/Iframe/Script Variants',severity:'CRITICAL',t:urlDecodeUni,t:lowercase,t:htmlEntityDecode"

final_rules.instructions: This rule targets obfuscated JavaScript URLs that specifically invoke the `alert()` function. It handles various forms of obfuscation, including whitespace and hyphens within the 'javascript:' protocol and the 'alert' keyword, followed by any characters until the closing parenthesis. `t:urlDecodeUni` ensures proper decoding of complex encodings.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Changed rule ID from 900002 to 9900002. Added `t:urlDecodeUni` for robust Unicode and double URL decoding. Simplified the `javascript` part of the regex to `javascript` and adjusted the following pattern to `[\s\x0b\-]*?:[\s\x0b\-]*?a[\s\x0b\-]*?l[\s\x0b\-]*?e[\s\x0b\-]*?r[\s\x0b\-]*?t[\s\x0b]*?\((?:[^)]*?)\)` to allow for whitespace/hyphens and improve performance by changing `(?:.*)` to `(?:[^)]*?)` to prevent catastrophic backtracking and specify matching within parentheses.

final_rules.instructions: This rule detects manipulated `onerror` event handlers commonly used in tags like `` to execute XSS attacks. It specifically looks for `onerror` followed by an assignment to `alert()` with various obfuscations, including whitespace and hyphens, and allows any content within the `alert()` function.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Changed rule ID from 900003 to 9900003. Added `t:urlDecodeUni` for robust Unicode and double URL decoding. Refined regex from `o(?:ne?-??rro?r(?:=.*)?\=??a\-?l\-?e\-?r\-?t\((?:.*))` to `on[\s\x0b\-]*?error[\s\x0b]*?=[\s\x0b]*?a[\s\x0b\-]*?l[\s\x0b\-]*?e[\s\x0b\-]*?r[\s\x0b\-]*?t[\s\x0b]*?\((?:[^)]*?)\)` for precision, improved performance by changing `(?:.*)` to `(?:[^)]*?)`, and better handling of optional spaces/hyphens around keywords and assignment operator.

generated_rules.instructions: This rule uses a case-insensitive regex pattern to detect commonly obfuscated tags including SVG, IMAGE, IFRAMES, and script tags used for XSS attacks. It targets potential obfuscations with varying combinations of separators and cases, suitable for multiple bypasses.
generated_rules.rule: SecRule ARGS|REQUEST_URI|REQUEST_HEADERS "(?i)<(?:s(?:(?:v\-?g|c\-?r\-?i\-?p\-?t|\/\-?s\-?c\-?r\-?i\-?p\-?t)|(?:i\-?m\-?g|i\-?f\-?r\-?a\-?m\-?e))|a\-?href)" "id:900001,phase:2,deny,status:403,msg:'XSS Obfuscated Payload Detected - SVG/IMG/Iframe/AHref Variants',severity:'CRITICAL',t:urlDecode,t:lowercase,t:htmlEntityDecode"

generated_rules.instructions: This rule targets obfuscated JavaScript URLs with embedded alert function calls. Variations of the "javascript:" protocol handler are detected, blocking attempts to use script execution methods.
Detects manipulated onerror event handlers possibly used in image tags to launch XSS attacks. It detects the use of onerror tied directly to potentially malicious alert triggers.
This rule targets payloads using extensive percent encoding, detecting common tags used for script injection even when heavily obfuscated.
generated_rules.rule: SecRule ARGS|REQUEST_URI|REQUEST_HEADERS "(?i)\%&#?2?5?3?[Cc](?:r[iI][pP][tT]|[iI]mg|[iI]fr rame|[sS]vg|a)(?:.*)?\%&#?2?5?3?[EeD]" "id:900004,phase:2,deny,status:403,msg:'Extensive URL Encoded XSS Payload Detected',severity:'CRITICAL',t:urlDecode,t:lowercase,t:htmlEntityDecode"
